title: Usability and security improvements for charts created with Rovo Chat
description: We've made it easier to share charts created with Rovo Chat by enabling Smart Link embedding. We’ve also aligned the look and feel of charts generated with Rovo Chat to those created across Atlassian and have patched some reported security vulnerabilities. To share a chart created with Rovo Chat: Create a chart using Rovo Chat by following[ these instructions.|https://support.atlassian.com/rovo/docs/using-rovo-chat-for-data-analysis/]Select the ‘Copy link’ option on your chart.Copy the generated
